# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION: 30

job_build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - # Build commands here, create artifacts
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries
      - configs

job_deploy_stage1:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - job_build
  script:
    - # Download and execute build artifacts from previous job
    - apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl
    - curl -LJO "http://$CI_PIPELINE_TOKEN@gitlab.com/artifacts/$CI_PIPELINE_ID/job/$CI_JOB_ID/download/binaries/*" -C -
    - curl -LJO "http://$CI_PIPELINE_TOKEN@gitlab.com/artifacts/$CI_PIPELINE_ID/job/$CI_JOB_ID/download/configs/*" -C -

job_deploy_stage2:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - job_deploy_stage1
  script:
    - # Deployment commands using downloaded artifacts

.gitlab-ci-artifact-expire:
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
  script:
    - cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR
    - git config --global user.email "ci-bot@example.com"
    - git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git init .gitkeep
    - git remote add origin gitlab+ssh://gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_NAME.git
    - git fetch --all --tags
    - git checkout master
    - git checkout -b expire-artifacts
    - echo "npm ci" >> .gitlab-ci.yml
    - cat << EOF >> .gitlab-ci.yml
      job_expire:
        stage: expire
        script:
          - git checkout $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME
          - git pull origin $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME
          - curl -X POST --data "token=$CI_PIPELINE_TOKEN" https://api.gitlab.com/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/runners/artifacts?job_id=$CI_JOB_ID&ref=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME
        only:
          - expire-artifacts
    EOF
    - git add .gitlab-ci.yml
    - git commit -m "Add artifact expiration job"
    - git push origin expire-artifacts
